heading: This Afternoon
text: A rising chance of showers and storms south of Route 4, likely to the north, except chance in the St. Lawrence Valley; a severe storm possible, mainly south. Highs from the mid 70s to around 80 south of Route 4, upper 60s to mid 70s from Route 4 to Route 2, and mid 60s to lower 70s north of Route 2, except around 60 far north. Winds from the south at 5 to 10 mph or becoming so, except easterly 5 to 10 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Showers and thunderstorms likely early east of the Greens, and farther west near the Massachusetts border, otherwise scattered, and all tapering off before midnight. Lows from the mid 40s to around 50 north, low to mid 50s in the south. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming west to northwest and diminishing overnight.

heading: Wednesday
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. A rising chance of morning showers in New York, then scattered afternoon in the south, and numerous north; a thunderstorm possible. Highs from the upper 50s to mid 60s north, and upper 60s to mid 70s in the south. Winds from the south to southwest at 5 to 10 mph or becoming so, except easterly 5 to 10 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.
